# Refund Policy

Refunds are issued within 5 business days to the original payment method.

To request a refund, go to your account settings and click "Request Refund". You will need to provide your order number and a reason for the refund.

Refunds are processed automatically for orders within 30 days of purchase. After 30 days, refunds require manual review by our support team.

Partial refunds may be issued for digital products that have been partially consumed.
